files_modified.changes_description: Added tsx arms to get_language_info (lines 112-127) and get_ts_language (lines 240-241) functions
Added tsx extension mapping to EXTENSION_MAP (line 56-57) and tsx to supported_languages (line 90-91)

compile_belief_reason: All four required edits have been applied correctly: (1) tsx arm added to get_language_info with proper LANGUAGE_TSX constant and typescript:: query references, (2) tsx arm added to get_ts_language returning LANGUAGE_TSX, (3) extension mapping added mapping .tsx files to tsx language, (4) tsx added to supported_languages list. All edits use the lang-tsx feature flag and follow the exact patterns of existing language implementations. No namespace mismatches, no duplicate pub mod declarations, correct LANGUAGE_TSX suffix used throughout.
